name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Justus?=
subject: Banks Scores Decisive Victory in Third District Congressional Debate
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Banks Scores Decisive Victory in Third District Congressional Debate**
"Tonight Congressman Banks scored a clear victory against his Democrat opponent. He clearly contrasted his conservative record of accomplishment against his opponent's support for the Nancy Pelosi and Bernie Sanders liberal agenda.

"Banks has supported the Trump agenda that unleashed the American economy, and the results speak for themselves. Wages are up, we have more jobs than people to fill those jobs, and businesses across the Third District are expanding. Tonight his opponent said she wants to reverse those gains by raising taxes and giving the government more control.

"Third District voters have a clear choice between the progress of the last two years and the left-wing agenda of Courtney Tritch and Nancy Pelosi.”

\- Steve Justus, Banks for Congress Campaign Manager
---

name: Alexandria Sousa, betofortexas.com
subject: 1 MILLION!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I wanted to be sure you saw the news: as of yesterday, volunteers across
Texas have knocked on ONE MILLION DOORS since our ‘get the vote’ for Beto
program began only a few short weeks ago. And supporters have made more
than 8.5 million calls!

But we’re not easing off the gas -- far from it. Next weekend, November 3
and 4, is our final weekend of action to ‘get out the vote’ for Beto
before Election Day. I’m asking you to host a phone bank and make calls to
as many Texas voters as possible to get them to the polls.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/host-event?source=ema20181028&t=1001&akid=22187%2E444211%2EqoyDhA ]Host a phone bank for Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=ema20181028&t=1002&akid=22187%2E444211%2EqoyDhA ]If you can’t host a phone bank, you can still help by contributing
$3
to help push Beto to victory.

With just 9 days to go, everything comes down to this final home
stretch. Together, we’ve built the largest grassroots field operation in
the nation. And it’s working: at this moment, Texas is seeing record voter
turnout. In many of our state’s 254 counties, more Texans have voted early
than in the entirety of 2014’s early voting period.

But whether Beto wins or loses comes down to what each of us does these
final days. So let’s give it everything we’ve got.

Thank you so much for being part of this,

Alexandria Sousa
Distributed Organizing Director
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=ema20181028&t=1003&akid=22187%2E444211%2EqoyDhA ]DONATE
$3

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181029footer&t=1004&akid=22187%2E444211%2EqoyDhA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=22187%2E444211%2EqoyDhA

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Paul Begala
subject: this is it, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Control of the House will be won or lost over the next 9 days -- and whether we win or lose will come down to the results in districts like AZ-01.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e11/1a8421e1/19b191d74/496e01e6/172185471/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
We've entered what might be my favorite part of campaign season, friends (and I've worked on quite a few campaigns). It's nearing the end of October. Election Day is in 9 days. Campaigns are up on TV, running ads on the issues at stake in this election in districts across the country. We're fending off dishonest attacks from Republican outside groups. **_This is it, friends._** Control of the House will be won or lost over the next 9 days -- and whether we win or lose will come down to the results in districts like AZ-01. **So I 'm asking you to support Tom O'Halleran** \-- an independent voice for Arizona families who has been called the most vulnerable Democrat in the House. [**It 's imperative that we keep this seat blue to take back the majority in 9 days, so please chip in to support Tom's re-election campaign right now.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b3_pb_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Your support really will be critical over the next 9 days, friends. Over that time, Tom's campaign must turn every single one of their supporters out to vote. That means driving voters to the polls. That means knocking thousands of doors. And that costs money. And they are counting on you to deliver. [**There isn 't much time, so please make a donation to Tom's team today to help them finish this race strong.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b3_pb_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Paul Begala | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b3_pb_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e11/1a8421e1/19b191d74/496e01e9/172185471/VEsA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e11/1a8421e1/19b191d74/496e01ea/172185471/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e11/1a8421e1/19b191d74/496e01eb/172185471/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

Campaigns are up on TV, running ads on the issues at stake in this election in districts across the country. We're fending off dishonest attacks from Republican outside groups. This is it, friends. Control of the House will be won or lost over the next 9 days -- and whether we win or lose will come down to the results in districts like AZ-01. So I 'm asking you to support Tom O'Halleran \-- an independent voice for Arizona families who has been called the most vulnerable Democrat in the House. "=" Your support really will be critical over the next 9 days, friends. Over that time, Tom's campaign must turn every single one of their supporters out to vote. That means driving voters to the polls. That means knocking thousands of doors. And that costs money. And they are counting on you to deliver. "=" Thanks, Paul Begala | ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

Peter,

**We have good news! **Our campaign is reaching tens of thousands of voters every week. Several counties are reporting record voter turnout. And Beto is running an unprecedented statewide campaign that lifts us all! This weekend, we walked turfs in Austin and Katy, Bellville and Brenham, La Grange, Eagle Lake and more. **In the last seven days, we've knocked on over 5,000 doors, made over 11,000 phone calls, and sent over 50,000 text messages to likely voters!** **[Keep us running through the finish line by donating $20 today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2893928/18593258/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjBmZWJhYS03MmRiLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dJ3XKJgOL0eVguoQhP2RdRZtw1CKCB3WPESrSaPzAQ=)**

Providing a nice boost to our volunteer efforts, **Democratic nominee for Governor Lupe Valdez joined our Austin blockwalk on Sunday.** Other folks are helping, too. **Volunteers from Postcards to Voters sent nearly 60,000 postcards** to help us get out the vote. And coordinated campaigns in several counties are reaching out to likely Democrats every day.

**Meanwhile, record turnout continues in Travis County, a great source of potential votes for us:** Five days of early voting remain, plus Election Day itself, and almost 28% of the Travis County electorate has already voted. **If Travis County reaches presidential turnout this election, all bets are off for numerous races across Texas, including my own.** In a final bit of good news,** Beto O'Rourke's campaign announced they've knocked on 1,000,000 doors across Texas since October 5!** And they hope to double that effort in the nine days we have left. **[Amazing things are happening in Texas. Keep this work going by donating today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2893929/18593259/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjBmZWJhYS03MmRiLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dJ3XKJgOL0eVguoQhP2RdRZtw1CKCB3WPESrSaPzAQ=)** Thank you to everyone who is participating in this work. Victory is within reach!

Mike

_\-- Business Insider_

**“Republicans outpacing Democrats in early voting in key states”**
_\-- NBC News_ Peter -- The only way Democrats will take back the Senate is if we win Indiana. And the only way we’ll win Indiana is if we _seriously_ step up our efforts to get out the vote.

Because if Republicans lead the early vote? That’s BAD NEWS. Our numbers are looking great, but we need to get them even higher to win.

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: You can help make history in the Granite State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
On November 6, we have a once-in-a-decade shot at reshaping the political landscape in New Hampshire.
If we keep working together, we can take back the governor's office with Molly Kelly, re-elect Annie Kuster, elect Chris Pappas to Congress and flip dozens of seats in the state legislature and on the Executive Council.
But that won't be possible if we don't put in the work to earn every vote.
The coming days are critical and we need all hands on deck. [**Please sign up now to volunteer with New Hampshire Democrats and help mobilize voters to elect our strong Democratic ticket.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1cf/2a380d31/3627e59a/f1643a/1636503448/VEsH/ "https://www.nhdp.org/events")
I know that with the leaders on this strong Democratic ticket by my side, we'll be able to make meaningful progress on issues like affordable healthcare, quality education, and fighting the opioid crisis.
If we want to build a better future, we've got to do everything we can to elect leaders who will fight for it. We may not have deep-pocketed corporate donors like the GOP, but we do have the power of the people.
And the only way we'll win is by talking to every voter and earning their support.
With your help, our Democratic candidates have a real shot at winning on November 6.
[**Please sign up today to do your part in bringing lasting change to New Hampshire.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1cf/2a380d31/3627e59a/f1643a/1636503448/VEsE/ "https://www.nhdp.org/events")
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1cf/2a380d31/3627e59a/f1643b/1636503448/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAyOF9OSERQVm9sUmVjcnVpdF9OSCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20181028_NHDPVolRecruit_NH&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Senator Amy Klobuchar
subject: Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan need your support
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend,

I'll get right to the point -- it's crunch time and it's **so important that we get out the vote to elect Tim Walz as Minnesota 's next governor.**

Tim and his running mate, Peggy Flanagan, make a fantastic team. And I know they're ready to work hard on behalf of all Minnesotans. **[So I'm asking you to make a donation to help them cross the finish line and win on Election Day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wkRUVkvo8g0B-EMsWKaESwQHgxLEKW4WhTsLS8OkHpU=/1FcbiVpeyBJkWEODxmdpZcR89bEk5CcXTlSElyIKWSw=?refcode=20181029nd&amount=10)**

Tim and Peggy are committed to ensuring that every Minnesotan can access **quality, affordable health care,** and they'll work to expand coverage and reduce costs.

And like me, Tim and Peggy are committed to **combating climate change** so that we can pass on our great outdoors and Minnesota way of life to future generations. It's why they'll work to cut greenhouse gases and expand the Renewable Energy Standard to reduce our dependence on fossil fuels.

**But Tim and Peggy won 't be able to accomplish any of this unless people vote on Election Day -- and time is running out for us to turn out voters. Will you make a contribution now to help Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan win on November 6th?**

name: Joe Biden
subject: something you should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Friends -
Molly Kelly is the real deal and running to be New Hampshire's next governor. I'm proud to support Molly because I know we can count on her to always put the people of New Hampshire first.
Some might consider her the underdog, but let me tell you, you shouldn't underestimate Molly Kelly.
**[Join me and support Molly Kelly for governor. Can you contribute $5 or more today?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a9c/d0ce7de/50d7eb28/9cdd8ac/352153544/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYmlkZW40bW9sbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI1My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/biden4molly?refcode=jtk253-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Molly was a single mother who raised three children while putting herself through college and then law school. She went on to challenge an incumbent Republican state senator and won. Molly has what it takes to win this race but she needs our support.
While Molly's opponent is funded by wealthy corporate special interests, she's rejected their donations and her campaign is being fueled by grassroots donors like you. That's a big deal, and that's why I'm asking you to help.
**[Help Molly fight back against wealthy special interests with a contribution to her campaign.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a9c/d0ce7de/50d7eb28/9cdd8ac/352153544/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYmlkZW40bW9sbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI1My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/biden4molly?refcode=jtk253-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
New Hampshire has a real chance to elect a new governor who will work for every Granite Stater, not just an elite few. **[That person is Molly Kelly, and that's why I'm asking you to chip in with a donation today.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a9c/d0ce7de/50d7eb28/9cdd8ac/352153544/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYmlkZW40bW9sbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI1My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/biden4molly?refcode=jtk253-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for making a difference and supporting Molly's campaign with me.
- Joe Biden

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: I want to explain the choice we’re giving
body:
| Peter -- In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in to our campaign before the final end-of-month deadline of this race. **But first, I want to explain the choice we’re giving voters in this race.** In the past decade or so, something has happened to our politics that has paralyzed our government. Hard-nosed partisanship, take-no-prisoners tactics, and toxic division have made getting things done in Washington near impossible. Meanwhile, there’s another person in this race who has been in Washington for the past 16 years learning the politics of the Swamp, and frankly, she has gotten very good at it. **If voters want more of the same, then I’m not their candidate -- Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn is.** But if voters want someone who brings experience in the business world, experience as a mayor and governor, and an interest in working with people to get things done, then I hope they’ll give me a shot to represent Tennessee again. **I’m ready for the job.** Tennessee voters have a choice in this election -- and every time a grassroots supporter like you donates to our campaign, you’re helping us put our positive message in front of voters. That’s why I’m asking: **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can so we have the resources we’ll need to get it done? Our final end-of-month deadline before Election Day is in just a few days, and your support will be critical to making sure the last days of this race are focused on our message, not dark money attacks.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2900217/18638984/-1509969489?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU5YTNjMi05YWRiLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8BuCyJwlJ5J84j7gJOUI_0xc47o1nRLMTMPimrMZLAU=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181029-eom-11&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******

We're only days away from making history here in the Sunshine State -- and there is no one better to propel us to victory than President Barack Obama.

Mayor Gillum has been drawing huge crowds across the state, and he'll be joining President Obama in South Florida this week -- and we need your help to keep up the momentum into the last weekend of early voting.

name: Team Tabitha
subject: I don’t know why she swallowed the fly. Perhaps she’ll die.
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/TI-Email-Theme-Header.png]

I’ve had this song in my head lately.

There was an old lady who swallowed a cow. I don't know how she swallowed a cow. She swallowed the cow to catch the dog. She swallowed the dog to catch the cat. She swallowed the cat to catch the bird. She swallowed the bird to catch the spider - that wiggled and jiggled and tickled inside her. She swallowed the spider to catch the fly. I don’t know why she swallowed the fly. Perhaps she’ll die.

It’s odd, I know, but here’s what I’ve been thinking. We hear about people doing terrible awful things – l ike mailing bombs to political figures or shooting a crowd at a synagogue - and we think to ourselves - Why in God’s green earth would this person have swallowed a cow?!? Their error is so enormous that they might as well be swallowing a cow. How in the world could a person do such a thing? But the truth is, that person swallowed that cow for a reason. They swallowed it to catch the dog. And they swallowed that dog for a reason – to catch the cat. And they swallowed that cat for a reason – to catch the bird.

You see, the whole thing started with one little thing. One little lie they swallowed, one hateful thought that they bought into. It was a mistake, sure, but it was such a little one. Surely it’s not worth worrying about.

But then that little lie demands you swallow a slightly bigger one. Which escalates to another. They have to keep swallowing bigger and bigger lies to deal with the one previous.

What starts as a little joke about Soros turns into full-blown & dangerous anti-Semitism. What starts as a sense that affirmative action is unfair turns into white nationalism.

Not overnight, but slowly over time. Little lies grow into bigger ones.

Those who object strongly to racial jokes or anti-Semitic jokes, those who insist on inclusive language in everyday life... they are often called snowflakes. They are critiqued for being overly sensitive, for swatting at flies. After all, no one is going to die from swallowing a fly.
But we do need to swat the flies. We do need to be vigilant about the small ways in which anti-Semitism, racial bigotry, and homophobia are swallowed. No one is going to die from swallowing these little jokes and off-handed comments. But these little flies – these little lies – lead to much bigger problems.

So keep those fly-swatters at the ready. We’ve got a lot of work to do to root out bigotry from our culture. And a more peaceful tomorrow starts with each one of us.

Let's join together and fight against bigotry - small and large.

Donate Now: https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2

Connect With Us:
Call the office at 334-425-8626
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner]
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK]

Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
PO Box 6340
Montgomery, AL 36106

Campaign HQ Address:
1460 Ann St.
Montgomery, AL 36107

body:
[1]Beto for Texas

A statistic from a recent poll conducted by the Texas Politics project
might surprise you: in years past, registered Independents in Texas have
historically voted for Republicans. But in our race, Independents prefer
Beto to Ted Cruz by 12 whole points.

This is huge news -- and further proof of all our hard work paying off.
Beto has been inviting millions of people of all backgrounds into our
historic campaign for U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181029&t=1019&akid=22346%2E444211%2EoInM6u ]In order to contact millions of Texas voters and get them to the
polls, Beto’s campaign relies on grassroots donations -- many from emails
just like this one. So we’re asking: can you step up today with a donation of
$3
or more to power us for these final 8 days?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181029&t=1020&akid=22346%2E444211%2EoInM6u ]Contribute
$3
»

Like Beto often says at his rallies, “If you’re a Democrat, you’re in the
right place. If you’re a Republican, you’re in the right place. If you’re
an Independent, you’re in the right place.”

We care about whether you want to do right by your neighbor, and right by
Texas. And if you do, you’re in the right place.

a contribution of

help Beto reach the FINAL end-of-month goal of this campaign?

Thanks,

Team Beto

[ ]Contribute $3 » Like Beto often says at his rallies, “If you’re a Democrat, you’re in the right place. If you’re a Republican, you’re in the right place. If you’re an Independent, you’re in the right place.” We care about whether you want to do right by your neighbor, and right by Texas. And if you do, you’re in the right place. [ ]Beto is counting on each of us to step up as much as we can in these final days to push him over the top. Can we count on you to give a contribution of $3 to help Beto reach the FINAL end-of-month goal of this campaign? Thanks, Team Beto [ ]Contribute $3 » Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tomorrow - LIVE Interview!
body:
| | Phil Robertson’s take on the upcoming elections.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5crtGNnmdLa3Zt7OFCjl2QRQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181029mfvl01&n=1)
| My Faith Votes LIVE [A Conversation with Phil Robertson](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5crtGNnmdLa3Zt7OFCjl2QRQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181029mfvl01&n=2)
**Date:** Tuesday, October 30, 2018
**Time:** 8PM ET | 5PM PT **_“We have political correctness on one side and biblical correctness on the other. Political correctness produces corruption and degradation. Biblical correctness produces virtue: goodness, love, joy, and gentleness. Love God and love each other...why don’t we try that for a while? Anyone with a brain can conclude that the depravity of political correctness is not the answer.”_** **\- Phil Robertson** Tomorrow, Tuesday, October 30th, at 8PM ET | 5PM PT we will be streaming live on [My Faith Votes' website](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5crtGNnmdLa3Zt7OFCjl2QRQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181029mfvl01&n=3) and our Facebook Page interviewing our friend Phil Robertson! Phil will let us know what he thinks of the midterm elections, and he will give us a sneak preview of what’s in his new book releasing in February, _The Theft of America’s Soul: Blowing the Lid Off the Lies That Are Destroying Our Country_. What are the lies in our culture that need to be confronted? And what role do Christians play in confronting them? There is no political correctness here – Phil isn’t afraid to call it as he sees it! So [save your seat](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5crtGNnmdLa3Zt7OFCjl2QRQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181029mfvl01&n=4) to watch this live interview tomorrow, and bring your questions! We will be taking live questions from the viewers! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5crtGNnmdLa3Zt7OFCjl2QRQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181029mfvl01&n=5)
---

name: Dana Bye
subject: new poll: VA-7 is a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
A new poll of VA-7, released this morning, finds that Abigail is locked in a dead heat with Rep. Dave Brat. With 8 days to go, Abigail earns the support of 46 percent of likely voters, and Rep. Brat earns 45 percent -- a statistical tie.
| | Peter, A new poll of VA-7, released this morning, finds that Abigail is locked in a dead heat with Rep. Dave Brat. _**With 8 days to go, Abigail earns the support of 46 percent of likely voters, and Rep. Brat earns 45 percent -- a statistical tie.**_ [**Can you make a donation right now, Peter, to turn this dead heat into a win for Central Virginia families?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y883R2MQeSIFNpTDzXLISomyfEzrEng5pBOJVK8OsVQ=/NUlyOIj47kfGSxPOV_HWQt13YTYgxC2anRXv4wcCLHc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This poll, conducted by the Wason Center for Public Policy at Virginia's own Christopher Newport University, offers some welcome news. We are gaining strength as we enter the final week of the race and Abigail's compelling story is resonating with voters. Democratic voter enthusiasm is also very high. **But this race is still too close to call, and many voters remain undecided, so we must double down on our voter outreach efforts to surge to a clear lead.** This is a historically Republican district, and we expect the final tally to come down to a handful of votes. Anything could make or break this dead heat, Peter, and with our final monthly fundraising deadline coming up on Wednesday, we can't afford to leave a single dollar on the table. [**Make a donation right now to help us reach our goal and close strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y883R2MQeSIFNpTDzXLISomyfEzrEng5pBOJVK8OsVQ=/NUlyOIj47kfGSxPOV_HWQt13YTYgxC2anRXv4wcCLHc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y883R2MQeSIFNpTDzXLISomyfEzrEng5pBOJVK8OsVQ=/NUlyOIj47kfGSxPOV_HWQt13YTYgxC2anRXv4wcCLHc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y883R2MQeSIFNpTDzXLISomyfEzrEng5pBOJVK8OsVQ=/NUlyOIj47kfGSxPOV_HWQt13YTYgxC2anRXv4wcCLHc=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y883R2MQeSIFNpTDzXLISomyfEzrEng5pBOJVK8OsVQ=/SAyhyLJYlgHy0-Mie-zaS56PCf9o1E0teceCourz_Kk=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: Ann Wasserman
subject: If you were procrastinating, stop it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Debbie's always been a hard worker. It's not easy to knock on 25,000 doors in a single campaign, but she did it in her very first run. That work ethic never disappeared, you know. Debbie's brought it to every campaign and every single day of her work in Congress. We've been through quite a few campaigns now, enough to know how it goes. Early voting already started. The election is in eight days. This is what you'd call "crunch time" -- and every deadline is doubly important. [**I know Debbie's team is trying to raise $218,000 before the end of the month to bring this campaign down the home stretch. Would you be able to pitch in $5 or more to help?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c91/622b7b5b/1d8f8024/307b66c0/2650958676/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181028am?refcode=dwse181028am_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Even when she was a little girl, Debbie never shied away from getting involved if she thought she could make a difference. She's always stood up to bullies. The bullies she takes on have changed -- but her attitude hasn't. She'll gladly stand between President Trump and Republicans in Congress when the rights of Florida middle-class families are at stake. **We can't let her stand alone.** This is the final week of the campaign, if you can believe it. I don't know where this year went, but it's almost gone now. So if you were procrastinating on chipping in, now's the time to stop it. [**Give what you can today.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c91/622b7b5b/1d8f8024/307b66c0/2650958676/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181028am?refcode=dwse181028am_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for standing with my daughter in this critical election year. Ann

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: This country is in the midst of a political revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
We are going to send a message to Washington that will be heard all over this country.
#

Sisters and Brothers -
All across this country, from coast to coast, people are standing up and fighting back — not only **_against_** Trump, but **for** an agenda that works for the working families of this country.
We’ve seen that this year from the striking teachers who demanded a decent education for their kids. We saw it from students across the country leading the fight for sensible changes to our gun laws. And we’ve seen it from the Disney workers, Amazon workers, and fast food workers demanding a living wage and safe working conditions.
And I will tell you what, I saw it all across the country on our tour we wrapped up with a massive event in California. At every stop, I saw huge numbers of people who are ready to send a message to Washington that will be heard all over this country, and all around the world, on Election Day.
But we cannot stop now, not with so much at stake. So I intend to spend the next eight days doing everything I can to rally progressives in Vermont and across the country to volunteer and to vote. But I need your help to make sure our message is heard:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to help me rally progressives to vote ahead of this election and in support of our progressive agenda? We are winning, and that’s because of support from people like you.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2824?refcode=em181029-full&t=25&akid=289%2E150750%2EV2AYdw)**
**Look at some of these crowds from our tour:**
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2824?refcode=em181029-full&t=26&akid=289%2E150750%2EV2AYdw)
Trump is going to try to divide us in this final week before the election. He is going to try to pit us against each other by race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, immigration status and however he can do it.
He is desperate to do it because he knows that if working people, young people, and people of color stand united, we are going to win. If he can divide us up, right-wing Republicans and the big-money interests will win.
What I saw on my tour was a people who are united. People who know that real change is possible when large numbers of ordinary Americans speak out, get involved in the democratic process, and vote.
Progressive change is coming. But we can’t stop fighting now. I won’t. But I need you with me.
**[Can you make a $3 donation to help me rally progressives to vote ahead of this election and in support of our progressive agenda? We are winning, and that’s because of support from people like you.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2824?refcode=em181029-full&t=51&akid=289%2E150750%2EV2AYdw)**
Sisters and brothers, this country is in the midst of a political revolution. People are tired of the status quo and a government that only benefits the 1 percent. On Election Day, we are going to stand together and fight back.
Eight days. Let’s give it all we’ve got.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2824?refcode=em181029-full&t=52&akid=289%2E150750%2EV2AYdw)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=53&akid=289%2E150750%2EV2AYdw). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=54&akid=289%2E150750%2EV2AYdw).

subject: Another Booming Quarter, and Even Democrats Can't Complain About the Economy
body:
| |
---
# _Another Booming Quarter, and Even Democrats Can't Complain About the Economy_
“Last Dec. 22, President Trump signed the tax reform bill — you know, the one that all Democrats loudly decried (but only a few decry now) as the ‘tax scam.’ That bill came on top of several major deregulatory measures during Trump’s first year,” the _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes. “On Friday, we saw the results for the second quarter since the ‘tax scam’ went into effect. And guess what? Its unexpectedly strong 3.5 percent annualized growth is a strong follow-up to the 4.1 percent growth in the second quarter of the year. Together, that makes for the best two-quarter stretch since 2014.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2ODc0MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45Njg3NDM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4MTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/editorials/another-booming-quarter-and-even-democrats-cant-complain-about-the-economy) “My Democratic colleagues have grown desperate. In the two years their party has sat on the sidelines, our nation has thrived under Republican leadership. That must be why, month after month, on issue after issue, Democrats and their far-left allies have tried to replace inconvenient facts with pure partisan scare tactics,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell writes in [_**The Washington Times.**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2ODc0MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45Njg3NDM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4MTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/28/bringing-american-politics-back-from-the-brink/?utm_source=RSS_Feed&utm_medium=RSS "https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/28/bringing-american-politics-back-from-the-brink/?utm_source=RSS_Feed&utm_medium=RSS") “When facts fail, the far left ratchets up the fear.” “Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen said the migrant caravan headed for the U.S. southern border will not cross over into the United States, on ‘Fox News Sunday,’” Nick Givas writes in [_**The Daily Caller.**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2ODc0MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45Njg3NDM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4MTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&102&&&https://dailycaller.com/2018/10/28/kirstjen-nielsen-migrant-caravan-fox-news-sunday/) “There is a legal way to enter this country. Those who choose to enter illegally will be stopped,” Secretary Nielsen said. “Ivanka Trump, daughter of President Donald Trump and adviser to his administration, visited Morehead State University on Friday afternoon during her tour of three job centers in eastern Kentucky,” Brad Stacy reports in [**_The Morehead News._**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2ODc0MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45Njg3NDM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4MTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.themoreheadnews.com/news/every-american-now-has-an-opportunity/article_ac7eb3f4-d95e-11e8-a56f-cfde675cfa0d.html) “For us, today was about looking at all the pathways of the American dream,” Ms. Trump said.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2ODc0MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45Njg3NDM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4MTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2ODc0MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45Njg3NDM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4MTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2ODc0MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45Njg3NDM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4MTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

clean_body: | | Another Booming Quarter, and Even Democrats Can't Complain About the Economy “Last Dec. 22, President Trump signed the tax reform bill — you know, the one that all Democrats loudly decried (but only a few decry now) as the ‘tax scam.’ That bill came on top of several major deregulatory measures during Trump’s first year,” the Washington Examiner editorial board writes. “On Friday, we saw the results for the second quarter since the ‘tax scam’ went into effect. And guess what? Its unexpectedly strong 3.5 percent annualized growth is a strong follow-up to the 4.1 percent growth in the second quarter of the year. Together, that makes for the best two-quarter stretch since 2014.” “My Democratic colleagues have grown desperate. In the two years their party has sat on the sidelines, our nation has thrived under Republican leadership. name: Team Kaine
subject: Election update: Good news + bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, really terrific news: The deadline to vote by absentee is tomorrow and we're seeing a tremendous increase of Democrats mailing their ballots in early. But there is some bad news
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1097/3e0906/7467381b/3e370cd7/2625003390/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&source=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND")

| | **Derek, really terrific news:**

**The deadline to request an absentee ballot by mail is[tomorrow](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1097/3e0906/7467381b/3e370cd6/2625003390/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&source=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND")** and we're seeing a tremendous increase of Democrats mailing their ballots in early. Our team has been with them every step of the way, sending texts, making calls, and knocking doors to make sure these ballots are mailed in.

**But there is some potentially _bad_ news:**

We've dug into the numbers and it looks like absentee ballot return is still much lower than we want it to be in some of our most critical areas, and our team needs to switch gears and make sure we are **sending thousands of texts and calls into Hampton Roads, Richmond, and other key areas** to get those vote by mail numbers up to the margin we need to win big.

[We can't run out of money. We need to fund this program, talk to every last Democrat that requested an absentee ballot, and reach our fundraising goal on Wednesday.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1097/3e0906/7467381b/3e370cd5/2625003390/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+We+canrsquot+run+out+of+money+We+need+to&utm_campaign=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&source=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND")

**Because Derek, it gets even worse.** Look how far we are from our goal: [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1097/3e0906/7467381b/3e370cd4/2625003390/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&source=20181029_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND") **Are you able to pitch in today? name: John Shimkus
subject: Just around the corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus
body:
As we speak, ballots are being mailed out, giving every voter in every corner of our state the ability to vote from home, on their own schedule, witho
[](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=e5a65b716329481099baf9596aaa0787&_e=XMRjNS1sVM2IpvSNf8E4G0VVFyphsqV8xGc6A9POLnyGMNWi5RJA9TbPls-RoMd049HtwCmEmHllG9J1Z8O81r93Dgh_JybBQOARQE0tz25AULLRaBJiLcnI7_GriSr2vKElrweYqtFRLo_6DJ7CTmp41vMTmFR6XhDP2IeW3_HyKSnVmBYYjednuXXmkigRS99AyQyYTFe8lk9nnczETdtBwqKT_iaALEpdaX1ISb2Q5BdkhT6_NG9D6yW8rEk2_mYj1lKljS_T2j-q8g_d0V340LiDWcaZkx7JnZWoSJX4KMYHONyjBLwxsijtm03t3HyzEIiiHq_gICyNJJNKVi6_SOVkuBYOL9bz-MrYIvZPlmuVFQVJoqbMAYk51PwUg3aHkUNVCWH9xAO0--My-g%3D%3D)
Friend,

Election Day is fast approaching. In just **8 days** , voters around the nation will head to the polls and cast their ballots. But did you know that here in Illinois, voting is already underway?

As we speak, ballots are being mailed out, giving every voter in every corner of our state the ability to vote from home, on their own schedule, without dealing with any lines or traffic.

Haven’t gotten your vote-by-mail ballot? It’s not too late. You can request your absentee ballot up until November 1... and it only takes a minute.

[Request an Absentee Ballot Now](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=e5a65b716329481099baf9596aaa0787&_e=XMRjNS1sVM2IpvSNf8E4G9EToTCytoBVI4ThnjDoBty6fiQeBoPsKcoqHUP6_sftd8VIDv2e2aOhENOBi7oLqIkuzGWQQW_DfHfAcb20voGcpnsL5nbUNptXVz7suLuPSAqqFql_lbM1sYTAAhpE4e7Dp-1NQXhkBrQSsPzyf6sifbI_xuRkeIJxxYz0LyIaASDivDM43hjOdxv9ICkWx0CtqjC2HCIxtTSpVevM0XdlcB1WJ_hAw-0agYf0y262PYnhqjkPq2nwB-m8JmW4Hw%3D%3D)
---

That’s not the only way to vote before Election Day. From now, up until Election Day, you can visit your local early voting location to cast a ballot in-person.

[Find your Early Voting Location](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=e5a65b716329481099baf9596aaa0787&_e=XMRjNS1sVM2IpvSNf8E4G9EToTCytoBVI4ThnjDoBty6fiQeBoPsKcoqHUP6_sftgMSrE1otykrJILSEqYAg61EW_E1htgGoj9D4-__41B5pMUvWdC_5aHTUtbwAGEbDGa847G0hqMuEVXPwQiK-KoIGCndwNm0aDU12hDNPXg6FNgAi9U_X9A7qPfbR45AqOXNdnDt7ZzPTvA6zp6Xlcy5V2xumlMXQxEghopmMA3KH4aSOEAnkuUHhOec8htbn2oVnTVHt2ZyEsL8BQ9z0ig%3D%3D)
---

Friend, this election is extremely important, not only for our local communities, but for our nation. This is our chance to show President Trump that we are with him – that we’re on board with his plan to continue putting America first!

We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines and let Election Day pass without doing our duty as Americans.

With so little time to go, I urge you to get prepared to cast your ballot, whether that means requesting an absentee ballot, finding your early voting location, or **[learning more about who’s running.](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=e5a65b716329481099baf9596aaa0787&_e=XMRjNS1sVM2IpvSNf8E4G9EToTCytoBVI4ThnjDoBtyf4wVT2XRuN5PtdWf2kQuT8bwVX5xKYX3XxJwxwg8lYh0otZfba1QOFafc8kHCojkveWDT5iMUbdXHRxuMr0Gtm6Q81dsl_q0nSJpe8EpNF3_XreAxkkGy6D5L8_FNylSBSF2Cdx29hxZcg-22MvXHGULkp2cWBTqRF4xzGcVeQWcG2Z9jO9eltbRXMr-TZrJ5kUoe27pUvDM7FeAWSf03ngErjdiyvBwFRlKxPlJEKrhOAYefAXPYS6v5qjvh_9s%3D)**

**Let’s get out the vote!**

Sincerely,

John

Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.

clean_body: As we speak, ballots are being mailed out, giving every voter in every corner of our state the ability to vote from home, on their own schedule, witho Friend, Election Day is fast approaching. In just 8 days , voters around the nation will head to the polls and cast their ballots. But did you know that here in Illinois, voting is already underway? As we speak, ballots are being mailed out, giving every voter in every corner of our state the ability to vote from home, on their own schedule, without dealing with any lines or traffic. Haven’t gotten your vote-by-mail ballot? It’s not too late. You can request your absentee ballot up until November 1... and it only takes a minute. That’s not the only way to vote before Election Day. From now, up until Election Day, you can visit your local early voting location to cast a ballot in-person. Friend, this election is extremely important, not only for our local communities, but for our nation. This is our chance to show President Trump that we are with him – that we’re on board with his plan to continue putting America first! We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines and let Election Day pass without doing our duty as Americans. With so little time to go, I urge you to get prepared to cast your ballot, whether that means requesting an absentee ballot, finding your early voting location, or Let’s get out the vote! Sincerely, John Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
AZ Central reports that "early-voting data shows overall voter enthusiasm at an all-time high for a midterm election, and, so far, Republicans have the clear advantage."
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "="._ ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: Mara Boggs
subject: 1 week to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Fellow West Virginian,

We have 1 week to go and we can't take our foot off the gas. Can you believe it?

In this election, you have to vote like your social security and healthcare depend on it - because they do.

Joe and his campaign team are hitting the trail hard in the final lap of the election. We won't quit until the final vote is counted. There is so much at stake in this election.

Here's what's on the ballot: securing Social Security and Medicare, ending the opioid epidemic, better pay for educators, taking care of our Veterans, and protecting people with pre-existing conditions.

FREEDOM

In a new TV ad, U.S. Senator Joe Manchin rides a motorcycle on West Virginia's beautiful country roads and shares what freedom means to him and the people of the Mountain State.

[Watch it HERE!](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfmajfa3AADkALuoCRFdofQLpSuUymxd09i8Djdfa8ku4uywqyTIGqAf1eVEIgaeH37HBHbirzOI%2bFRj5RY0RTiE%2fUnSkrKVNCxdSEuS7iDCo%3d)
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfmajfa3AADkCkh333La8UG7UOgffhZnj0odMM2usp4AtrY8PANXaj83PRPCgfEtDjRTVvgolVyI0%3d)

Don't forget that our freedom is on the ballot this year.

EARLY VOTING

Have you voted yet? There is no excuse to miss the opportunity to skip the line and vote early.

Click here to find your early voting location: [https://www.iwillvotewv.com/](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4wUl%2fFRvPL6cbdo1zquwoac%2fYA0LSzDbwYrLrfa7SIbY443fgHjtgFblZkN0AHbM8HfjZ5t5XG8al4fDj0TKIRJMlUr2mgoglg%3d%3d)

Make sure to bring five friends with you to vote early and make your voice heard.

DEBATE ON THURSDAY

REMINDER: Joe will debate Patrick Morrisey this Thursday at 7PM. It can be viewed online and on your local television station.

Follow the campaign on Twitter [@JoeManchinWV](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49Xbu0JOVLjgegUh6KB0aMHom9gpipScbqoKluhFiUUHo5vrbrCqON7qsxSgjZuXokh0f6DyuO0PXrIRWkyulMrXd4sBvlHVbg%3d%3d) to get real time updates from the debate.

A CLEAR CONTRAST

Need a reminder of what's at stake in this election, take a look at this graphic. Take a second and share it with your friends on social media.

UPDATES FROM THE TRAIL

In the last few days, Team Manchin has hit every area of the state, from the Eastern Panhandle, the Northern Panhandle, the Potomac Highlands, the Coalfields, North Central West Virginia, and many big and small towns in between.

Thank you for all of your support! We hope you can join us for our Election Night celebration in Charleston. [Click here to get the details. ](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09Gy%2b4kVIU5TnBDnaQWHYL5h%2fAm0wW9PvH%2fh6U92ZKSfdMP2dT4HsZ1eVCq30a96f51bJSx81q4WSFrcY93XqdukbWvudNN988US93AT7F0mHWw%3d%3d)

On to Victory,
Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---

P.O. Box 5202
Charleston, WV 25361
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC457kkjv9LkTjvDXRuLbXMKT3SLPHL8f66seeqvDN0HKv0yZtvicTJBHji0Rx3fpXm%2fh2PIGbpA56ZmM8ZFXvbp1NGeD8qcDsppJfQufYNAiO%2f3aS9exDIfkXtYsTflgoLNKekjj2NlUNNpv1DHub6m5TgqHPpTR00WlsXINpv7rdwkfjMbNYNzbMRQqWlyJIGJaZt53khTLcoXlysayI5k1rV1ncHySY0PeheukiQ1Muk2b56HYqokE%3d)
---

name: Team Inslee
subject: Jay wants to hear from you [Take the Survey ]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Do you think we'll win this November?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema") | **Is the Blue Wave Coming?** With just 8 days before the 2018 midterm elections, we want to hear from you now. Take Jay's survey and let us know what YOU think will happen. | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema")
---
Friend,
We have only a few days left before voters across the country submit their ballots. So much is on the line this year. From control of the House and Senate in the other Washington, to historic governors races in states like Georgia and Florida, to state legislatures that will determine redistricting after the 2020 census, this election will shape the future of our country.
Here on Team Inslee, we're all rooting for a blue wave to sweep this country and show the Trump administration that we won't let their climate-denying, lobbyist-fueled policies destroy our planet and our economy.
But polls are going every which way, and 2016 proved that we can't trust all the prognosticators' forecasts. We're much more concerned with what's actually happening on the ground, in our communities, at a grassroots level.
So we're reaching out to you today to ask you a few simple questions about what YOU'RE hearing from your friends and neighbors.
**Do you think the Blue Wave will happen? Will Democrats sweep the country this year?**
[YES »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema") | | [NO »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema")
---|---|---
**Are you planning to vote?**
[YES »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema") | | [NO »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsA/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema")
---|---|---
**Is climate change a top issue for you this cycle?**
[YES »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsB/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema") | | [NO »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsO/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema")
---|---|---
By filling out this survey today, you'll become part of Jay's focus group, whose opinions will help define our solutions to the problems this country is facing. We'll reach out occasionally to hear from you about the direction we should take from here. Together, we can determine what our country needs at this critical time.
Thanks so much for taking a minute to let us know what you think!
Team Inslee
[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9346/1151107846/VEsP/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5f7/2f5ea88d/743f86fa/2cbd9345/1151107846/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&refcode=ema_2018-10-27_eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_campaign=eom-focus-group-nonsigners&utm_medium=ema")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Growing the Economy
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=cdbc467bbb&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dafe4e6eb1&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=78e7eae6c1&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9cfac2749e&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0de7b7c06e&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0de7b7c06e&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Friend,
---
| With Election Day just one week away, I wanted to reach out to fill you in on some of the efforts we’ve made to grow the economy over the past two years.

Our economic growth initiatives have been driven by a focus on growing the workforce, supporting our rural and farm economies, expanding economic incentives, fostering a cradle-to-career education system, and supporting our small businesses.

In my first term, we’ve accomplished a great deal to grow the economy, but here are just a few highlights:
* Passed the ThinkVT/Innovation Program to invest in **small business accelerators, broadband expansion, and co-working spaces;**
* Made growing the workforce a top priority--and **added 4,000 new workers this year** alone;
* Increased Downtown and Village Center Tax Credits, which, along with new TIF districts, will **boost economic development** in targeted areas around our state;
* Invested **$5 million in the Child Care Financial Assistance Program** to make child care more affordable and accessible;
* Boosted our **investment into higher education by $7.1 million** , with the additional dollars tied directly to tuition affordability;
* **Eliminated tuition for members of the Vermont National Guard** attending state colleges;
* **Invested in Career and Technical Education (CTE)** centers across our state, with new training equipment, new spaces, and expanded opportunities;
* Added **new small business advisors in underserved areas** of Vermont;
* Passed a **sales tax exemption for equipment in our logging and processing sector** ;
* **Re-convened the Vermont Milk Commission** to make recommendations on how to stabilize the dairy industry;
* Launched the **Vermont Outdoor Recreation Economic Collaborative**(VOREC) program to grow our outdoor economy;
* Increased our **investment in marketing Vermont** as a place to live, work, and raise a family; and
* **Modernized licensing requirements** so servicemen and women could more easily transition into the workforce.

In conjunction with our efforts to make Vermont more affordable--including two General Fund budgets with n**o new taxes or fees** , **$30 million in income tax relief** , **$71 million in avoided property tax rate hikes** , and the l**argest investment in affordable housing** in state history--these important initiatives will help expand economic prosperity to all four corners of Vermont.

But we have much more work to do. **With your support, I’m confident we can continue to build on this strong foundation for a prosperous economy.**

Sincerely,
Governor Phil Scott
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=cfd1cca98c&e=19cebfe173)

name: betofortexas.com
subject: Breaking: Cruz only "ahead by inches"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Quinnipiac just released a new poll in our race to take on Ted Cruz. From
their last poll in early October to today, we’ve significantly closed the
gap -- gaining four points in a little over two weeks.

Now, according to Quinnipiac, Cruz is only “ahead by inches.” With just
days to go until Election Day, we need to give everything we’ve got and
more to push Beto over the top. So we’re asking:

or more to Beto’s campaign today? Help us capture this momentum and

This weekend, we broke the news that our incredible volunteers and
organizers have knocked on more than 1 million doors across Texas since we
began our ‘get out the vote’ push -- and their hard work is making a
measurable difference in this race.

It’s been proven that the #1 way to actually increase voter turnout is
person-to-person conversations with voters. And thanks to your support,
our team is reaching more voters than any campaign ever has in Texas
history. We have to get more resources to them ASAP.

That’s why it’s so critical we reach our FINAL end-of-month fundraising

on the line.

in your first
donation to help us reach our goal?

More than 1 million doors knocked. “Inches” between Beto and Cruz. 8 days
to go. Let’s leave it all on the field. Let’s win this.

Team Beto

It’s been proven that the #1 way to actually increase voter turnout is person-to-person conversations with voters. And thanks to your support, our team is reaching more voters than any campaign ever has in Texas history. We have to get more resources to them ASAP. That’s why it’s so critical we reach our FINAL end-of-month fundraising goal. If we fall short, we’ll need to reconsider how hard we fight during the home stretch of the campaign. At a time when this entire election is on the line. [ ]We can’t fall short -- not after everything we’ve done. Can you pitch in your first donation to help us reach our goal? More than 1 million doors knocked. “Inches” between Beto and Cruz. 8 days to go. Let’s leave it all on the field. Let’s win this. Team Beto [ ]Contribute $3 » Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Chris Sloan, Steve Sisolak for Governor
subject: Here’s our plan:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
Early voting is underway, and we're encouraging Nevadans not to hesitate -- get out there and cast your ballot! But we know that a lot of people will head to the polls on Election Day, next Tuesday, November 6th, too.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7Md7aT6PQhbrbJfL16su-mz_M6HWDum8OPw1OvRt3mA=/Cjy5MVK_jq19JR0_oHwdbxiTbqSxesysAUjR86CPDPA=?gpsid=8_57_4793&refcode=em18_181029_GOTV1_logo_fnd_gq_ful__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181029_GOTV1_logo_fnd_gq_ful__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

Okay, team. **Eight. Days. Left.**

Early voting is underway, and we're encouraging Nevadans not to hesitate -- get out there and cast your ballot! But we know that a lot of people will head to the polls on Election Day, next Tuesday, November 6th, too.

So we're about to launch our massive get-out-the-vote campaign.

Everything's in place, but we still need resources to mobilize our volunteers and get the word out. I'll be honest: that means money. And that's why I'm writing to you right now.

**[Will you contribute $5 or more before our deadline at the end of the month-- Wednesday at midnight -- to help get the vote out for Steve?](https://act.myngp.com/el/7Md7aT6PQhbrbJfL16su-mz_M6HWDum8OPw1OvRt3mA=/Cjy5MVK_jq19JR0_oHwdbxiTbqSxesysAUjR86CPDPA=?gpsid=8_57_4793&refcode=em18_181029_GOTV1_l1_fnd_gq_ful__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181029_GOTV1_l1_fnd_gq_ful__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: You can't poll transformation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Do something today to move us one step closer to victory. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa75d/34a064cc/558552/70cab24/287751878/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - What I'm going to say next might surprise you: _Stop looking at the polls_. Our race is statistically tied. But the truth is, you can't poll transformation. You can't poll excitement, or faith, or hope for the next generation of Georgians. So instead of checking the polls and worrying about what's going to happen next week, do something today to move us one step closer to victory. Take action: **[I'm asking you personally to sign up for a volunteer shift this week. I am counting on supporters like you to help get out as many voters as possible between now and November 6th. I can't emphasize enough how important this is.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa75d/34a064cc/558552/70cab25/287751878/VEsE/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")** Traditional pollsters have never been able to capture newly engaged voters - the very people our campaign has invested so much in reaching. We're giving new and different Georgians a reason to believe their vote counts, their voice matters. Now, we need to make sure every single one of those people makes it to the ballot box. But to do that, we need bodies knocking doors. We need _you_. Thank you for everything you've done to support my campaign so far. I know I can count on you to help us finish strong. Our future is worth fighting for. Stacey Abrams
---
**[VOLUNTEER](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa75d/34a064cc/558552/70cab25/287751878/VEsC/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")**

name: Joe Biden
subject: Hey, this guy has a creed
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb361c/9e00690/571594af/2400e6f2/1953919119/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx&source=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx")
Hello --

I'm writing to you after spending some time with Andrew Gillum on the campaign trail.

When I stood next to Andrew and listened to his story, I heard how he still hears his grandmother's voice. How she told him to go to school, to mind his teachers, to get that education and bring it home -- not just for him, but for his brothers, his sister, and his community.

Folks, we've got someone special here.

This is a guy who lives by a code -- his grandmother's creed -- to not just better himself, but to better the lives of everyone around him. That's how you know Andrew will lead with selfless courage and a conviction to get the job done.

So when Andrew says he is going to bring it home for Florida, I know he's going to lead this state and deliver results with the kind of decency and integrity that will make us all proud.

**[But for Andrew to win this election, he needs us working alongside him. Today, I'm asking you to chip in $5 to help Andrew Gillum get out the vote.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb361c/9e00690/571594af/2400e68a/1953919119/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-biden?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+But+for+Andrew+to+win+this+election+he+n")**

And let me tell you, Andrew knows the heart and soul of Florida.

He's the son of a bus driver and a construction worker. He knows how a good public education can change the destiny of one's life. Andrew knows that -- and he won't ever forget it. He knows what it's like to work hard to earn every penny just to make ends meet. For him, funding education, expanding healthcare, taking on the NRA to end gun violence, and creating good-paying jobs are what he wants to accomplish for all Floridians if he gets the chance to be governor.

Folks, if you want change, you've got to show up and make it happen. You've got to vote and you've got to get your friends and neighbors out to vote. This election isn't just about you, me, or Andrew. It's about all of us.

**[That's why I'm pleading with you to chip in $5 to help Andrew Gillum get out the vote and win this election.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb361c/9e00690/571594af/2400e68d/1953919119/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-biden?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+Thats+why+Im+pleading+with+you+to+chip+i")**

Bring it home,

Joe

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb361c/9e00690/571594af/2400e68c/1953919119/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-biden?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb361c/9e00690/571594af/2400e68f/1953919119/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb361c/9e00690/571594af/2400e68e/1953919119/VEsHBg/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx&source=em18_181029_Biden_fnd_gq_act__JB_ettx"). clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- "" Hello -- I'm writing to you after spending some time with Andrew Gillum on the campaign trail. When I stood next to Andrew and listened to his story, I heard how he still hears his grandmother's voice. How she told him to go to school, to mind his teachers, to get that education and bring it home -- not just for him, but for his brothers, his sister, and his community. Folks, we've got someone special here. This is a guy who lives by a code -- his grandmother's creed -- to not just better himself, but to better the lives of everyone around him. That's how you know Andrew will lead with selfless courage and a conviction to get the job done. So when Andrew says he is going to bring it home for Florida, I know he's going to lead this state and deliver results with the kind of decency and integrity that will make us all proud. "" And let me tell you, Andrew knows the heart and soul of Florida. He's the son of a bus driver and a construction worker. He knows how a good public education can change the destiny of one's life. Andrew knows that -- and he won't ever forget it. He knows what it's like to work hard to earn every penny just to make ends meet. For him, funding education, expanding healthcare, taking on the NRA to end gun violence, and creating good-paying jobs are what he wants to accomplish for all Floridians if he gets the chance to be governor. Folks, if you want change, you've got to show up and make it happen. You've got to vote and you've got to get your friends and neighbors out to vote. This election isn't just about you, me, or Andrew. It's about all of us. "" Bring it home, Joe "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Senator Bill Nelson
subject: urgent, critical decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is urgent, everyone -- we need a huge boost to keep our TV ads on the air for the final stretch, and we're coming up short. That's why Maggie said I should reach out.
POLITICO says that Democrats have NO chance to take back the Senate if we lose in Florida, but a recent poll shows us down by 2. This race -- and Senate control -- will be decided in the next 8 days. That's why this goal is so important.
Almost 3 million Floridians have already cast their ballots, and our team is making decisions about what we can fund day by day. My opponent, Rick Scott just dumped another $23 million into this race, and we can't fund our ads and win this race without you.
Time is running out, and we're still short. If you want to take back the Senate for Democrats, I'm counting on you to give right now to keep our ads live and protect Florida's Senate seat:
[**Please rush $3 or more now before tonight to protect Florida's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1cd/2a380d31/361c39fa/f1640b/139258891/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0bmVsc29uIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMjlfTVdINE5lbHNvbl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4nelson?refcode=e20181029_MWH4Nelson_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Jessica Morse
subject: We need you this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/PQ-x1NLQq00RYQZoHRDxKXUYO7nYVEda0fyMNykhMcM=/cnLYxox9haBWCGMgmKDfN1bPfjLEpZQBMctjX1OHbfA=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181029_JM_20181029-gotv_all_logo)
Peter,
The tragedy and violence of this past week reminds us what is at stake in this election--the healing of our nation. Anti-Semitism, xenophobia, and hate stem from rhetoric that incites violence. A culture that defines political opponents as enemies or "evil" results in postmarked assassination attempts of political leaders.
Here's the solution: We have to reach people neighbor to neighbor. We have to remind our community that what unites us is stronger than these false divisions.
**This election is going to be close --and now, with just a few days left to go, we need you to take us across the finish line. We need all hands on deck to get our message out to voters this weekend--sign up for your Get Out the Vote weekend shift now:**

[SIGN ME UP ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/PQ-x1NLQq00RYQZoHRDxKXUYO7nYVEda0fyMNykhMcM=/hWUUg9_pkwzPKEubEL94JviLJVWihfniyZzvwUk2Qj0=)
---

This is a desperate cry for our nation to heal. We cannot tolerate intolerance. This weekend, we need you to take all that commitment, perseverance, and grace you've already shown and dial it up to 100.
It's our final weekend to reach voters. It's our final weekend to get the job done.
The best way to drown out the noise on cable news, talk radio, and Twitter is to lace up our shoes and talk to neighbors face-to-face, human-to-human. Now, let's prove that a campaign powered by grassroots energy--from Tahoe to Tollhouse, from rural Sonora to Roseville--can win.
**[_**Sign up for your Get Out the Vote weekend shift now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/PQ-x1NLQq00RYQZoHRDxKXUYO7nYVEda0fyMNykhMcM=/hWUUg9_pkwzPKEubEL94JviLJVWihfniyZzvwUk2Qj0=)**
Thank you,
Jessica

name: Team Scholten
subject: New Ad! Republicans for Scholten?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
One of the strengths of J.D. Scholten is his ability to reach out to voters from all across the political spectrum. He’s earned the support of not only Democrats, but also several Republicans and countless independents. Today we released a new 90-second ad, featuring testimonials from Republicans, farmers, Trump supporters, and former King supporters, **who are all voting for J.D.**
**Preview the new ad and consider a final week contribution to our campaign by clicking the image below:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2907225/18707472/246538328?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI3YjFhZC1kOGRiLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FvFvF5mWcKbFE3hBzEC5-ltiHyOfbNbSIAxLfeIRUvo=)
