Scholten represents a new voice who will not only show up, but will bring people together to build our district’s future.**
[**_Please consider a contribution today to help us finish what we’ve started and defeat Steve King._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2907226/18707473/246538328?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI3YjFhZC1kOGRiLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FvFvF5mWcKbFE3hBzEC5-ltiHyOfbNbSIAxLfeIRUvo=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Republicans are lying about their position on pre-existing conditions. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, this would be hilarious if it weren't so outrageously false:

**In the final days of this election, Republicans are running on a message that _they_ are the party who will protect coverage for pre-existing conditions.**

We can't let them lie their way out of this one. In these last 8 days before all votes are cast, Linda's working to call out the Republicans for their endless attempts to undermine Americans' access to affordable healthcare.

**[Will you donate to help Linda reach her FINAL pre-election goal of $20,000 before midnight on November 5?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ******[Chip in $10 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036690/4ac3d62d/6a0852df/1ce29825/1646397298/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM")******
---
******[Chip in $25 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036690/4ac3d62d/6a0852df/1ce2983a/1646397298/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM")******
******[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036690/4ac3d62d/6a0852df/1ce2983b/1646397298/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM")******
******[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036690/4ac3d62d/6a0852df/1ce29838/1646397298/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM")******
******[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036690/4ac3d62d/6a0852df/1ce29839/1646397298/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM")******
******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
Here's the truth Republicans don't want you to hear:
1. They voted to overturn the Affordable Care Act and replace it with a terrible plan that would have made coverage for pre-existing conditions unaffordable for millions of Americans.

2. The Trump Administration is _suing in federal court_ to overturn the ACA's requirement that health insurers cover pre-existing conditions.

This is an election that will determine the future of healthcare in this country. If the Republicans keep control of Congress, they will continue their work to roll back the ACA.

**A Democratic House will stop these efforts once and for all.**

Linda needs your help to push our message in these final 8 days: that Democrats are the party that brought coverage for millions of Americans, and that we will never stop protecting that coverage.

[**Her work will help Democrats in California and around the country close strong in the districts that will decide control of the House. Please donate what you can to help us reach our goal today!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

Team Sanchez
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036690/4ac3d62d/6a0852df/1ce2983f/1646397298/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036690/4ac3d62d/6a0852df/1ce2983c/1646397298/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036690/4ac3d62d/6a0852df/1ce2983d/1646397298/VEsHBg/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
PO Box 59660
Norwalk, CA 90652

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: FW: new poll: VA-7 is a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I am locked in a dead heat with Rep. Dave Brat. This is an incredible accomplishment, and it is happening because this grassroots team has equipped our campaign with the resources to share our closing message with voters.
| | Peter, I hope you saw the latest poll of our race, which shows that I am locked in a dead heat with Rep. Dave Brat, and we are gaining as we sprint toward Election Day. This is a historically Republican district, **but our message of building consensus and delivering results is persuading voters, Peter.** This is an incredible accomplishment, and it is happening because this grassroots team has equipped our campaign with the resources to share our closing message with voters. Now, with 8 days to go, it will be all hands on deck until the very end. We will knock every door we can, make every call we can, and [**raise every dollar we can,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gg-ZI5K_TDI4ZB75B6lZBytALhDxD3RlQ6T8rlqMQfo=/A7UgEbi8U80BMSLycfvoqDvMY7sy4fJj6YfxHceQkzg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) so we can continue surging and deliver a win for Central Virginia families. [**Make a donation today to help us, if you can, Peter.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gg-ZI5K_TDI4ZB75B6lZBytALhDxD3RlQ6T8rlqMQfo=/A7UgEbi8U80BMSLycfvoqDvMY7sy4fJj6YfxHceQkzg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This race is close, and your support is making a difference. Thanks, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Dana Bye Sent: Mon, Oct 29, 2:47 PM Subject: new poll: VA-7 is a dead heat Friends, A new poll of VA-7, released this morning, finds that Abigail is locked in a dead heat with Rep. Dave Brat. _**With 8 days to go, Abigail earns the support of 46 percent of likely voters, and Rep. Brat earns 45 percent -- a statistical tie.**_ [**Can you make a donation right now, friends, to turn this dead heat into a win for Central Virginia families?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gg-ZI5K_TDI4ZB75B6lZBytALhDxD3RlQ6T8rlqMQfo=/A7UgEbi8U80BMSLycfvoqDvMY7sy4fJj6YfxHceQkzg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This poll, conducted by the Wason Center for Public Policy at Virginia's own Christopher Newport University, offers some welcome news. We are gaining strength as we enter the final week of the race and Abigail's compelling story is resonating with voters. Democratic voter enthusiasm is also very high. **But this race is still too close to call, and many voters remain undecided, so we must double down on our voter outreach efforts to surge to a clear lead.** This is a historically Republican district, and we expect the final tally to come down to a handful of votes. Anything could make or break this dead heat, friends, and with our final monthly fundraising deadline coming up on Wednesday, we can't afford to leave a single dollar on the table. [**Make a donation right now to help us reach our goal and close strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gg-ZI5K_TDI4ZB75B6lZBytALhDxD3RlQ6T8rlqMQfo=/A7UgEbi8U80BMSLycfvoqDvMY7sy4fJj6YfxHceQkzg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gg-ZI5K_TDI4ZB75B6lZBytALhDxD3RlQ6T8rlqMQfo=/A7UgEbi8U80BMSLycfvoqDvMY7sy4fJj6YfxHceQkzg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gg-ZI5K_TDI4ZB75B6lZBytALhDxD3RlQ6T8rlqMQfo=/A7UgEbi8U80BMSLycfvoqDvMY7sy4fJj6YfxHceQkzg=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/gg-ZI5K_TDI4ZB75B6lZBytALhDxD3RlQ6T8rlqMQfo=/YoAYlJwnqQQEv14Rt-W7cF1UZZbS3BwNnKn--Af1_ko=)_

name: Molly
subject: hey, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Friends - quick note here: I'm coming up on a huge deadline, but I just heard from my team that we still need to raise another $4,700 by midnight to hit our goal.
Luckily, a group of generous donors has offered to match every gift, dollar for dollar, until tonight's deadline - because if we're going to win in New Hampshire, we simply cannot come up short.
**I'm running to put families like yours first, so - unlike Chris Sununu - I'm not taking any money from corporations. That's why this match opportunity is so crucial for us if we want to take back the corner office.**
**Please, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important:[Will you give $5 or more right now - whatever you can spare - and have every dollar DOUBLED to win in New Hampshire and build a state that works for everyone, not just the special interests?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a98/d0ce7de/50dc8f71/9cddb8e/3842021043/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjU3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk257-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for being by our side. Molly
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Supporters of Molly Kelly email list, please click here.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a98/d0ce7de/50dc8f71/9cddb8d/3842021043/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://mollykelly.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. Debby Butler, Fiscal Agent

name: Semedrian Smith
subject: This is how you can have an impact.

body:

| | It's coming down to the wire, Peter. The next eight days are all about how we make our mark on this race and pitch in however we can to send Sherrod back to the Senate. [**Don 't wait -- sign up to make calls or knock on doors in your area.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd08/4462dc26/70be03f3/201f2dc9/1074698358/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181029o") The energy we're seeing right now will carry us over the finish line. name: John Lewis
subject: my colleague Tom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Keeping AZ-01 blue in November is also critical to winning the House majority -- and winning the majority will allow Democrats to provide a desperately needed, independent check on the White House.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e1c/1a8421e1/19b0b702a/496bb2c2/1600550448/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, I have devoted my life to the cause of fighting for justice. Over my career in Congress, I have had the pleasure of serving with colleagues who share my commitment to ensuring that all Americans are treated equally under the law -- _and one such colleague is Tom O 'Halleran._ **Since he arrived in Congress, Tom has maintained a relentless focus on standing up for working families in Arizona.** He has been a partner in keeping the current Administration accountable and he is a fighter for his constituents and for our nation's democratic values. But Tom faces a tough fight for re-election this fall, and he needs our support to ensure that he can keep up the fight in Congress. [**Friends, will you help my friend Tom win this fall with a donation today, ahead of his important fundraising deadline on Wednesday?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b2_jl_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") It is imperative that Tom win re-election this fall, friends, because Arizona families deserve his independent voice serving them in Washington. His far-right opponent would be a rubber-stamp for the current Administration and all its worse abuses. **Keeping AZ-01 blue in November is also critical to winning the House majority** \-- and winning the majority will allow Democrats to provide a desperately needed, independent check on the White House. [**So, please consider supporting my valued colleague today with a donation before his important deadline on Wednesday.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b2_jl_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, Congressman John Lewis | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b2_jl_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e1c/1a8421e1/19b0b702a/496bb2c5/1600550448/VEsA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e1c/1a8421e1/19b0b702a/496bb2c6/1600550448/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e1c/1a8421e1/19b0b702a/496bb2c7/1600550448/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

body:

| | You heard from Debbie's mom this morning already. Now it's my turn. Last I heard, Debbie's team was about $27,000 away from reaching the $218,000 final monthly goal of the election. [**Would you be able to pitch in before time runs out?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c97/622b7b5b/1d84b577/307b6629/1751234520/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181028pm?refcode=dwse181028pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Mom was right this morning -- we've been through this a few times now. name: Ralph Northam
subject: Please, stop what you're doing and read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, a couple dates are on my mind right now: ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, a couple dates are on my mind right now:
* Tomorrow is the deadline for Virginians to request absentee ballots.

* Wednesday is the last End of Month fundraising goal for 2018.

* On Thursday, we begin the process of getting health coverage to approximately 400,000 Virginians who do not have it. Let me tell you a little bit more about how these three things are related:

**The third date is made possible by the first and second. When we get Virginians out to vote -- like we did here in 2017 -- good things happen in the Commonwealth of Virginia. We can pass important bills like Medicaid expansion that make our states, and country, better.**

I'm doing everything I can at the state level, but there are some real threats at the federal level if we don't get out and vote. We can't send Tim's opponent, Corey Stewart, to the Senate and watch him take shots at Social Security, Medicaid, and our health care. We have to do something.

[In 2017 we stopped threats to the most vulnerable Virginians by talking to voters, making donations and running a strong grassroots statewide program. We need to do that again for Tim Kaine and our House Democrats.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1093/3e0906/74769fa9/3e370e86/74050082/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+In+2017+we+stopped+threats+to+the+most+v&utm_campaign=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&source=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd")

**First things first: We need them to hit their goal in two days. They have $24,618 to go, please donate below so they don 't fall short:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1093/3e0906/74769fa9/3e370e85/74050082/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&source=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd")
---
| [**DONATE $25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1093/3e0906/74769fa9/3e370e84/74050082/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&source=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1093/3e0906/74769fa9/3e370e9b/74050082/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&source=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd")
---
| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1093/3e0906/74769fa9/3e370e9a/74050082/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&source=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd")
---
| [**DONATE $250**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1093/3e0906/74769fa9/3e370e99/74050082/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+250&utm_campaign=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&source=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1093/3e0906/74769fa9/3e370e98/74050082/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&source=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd")
---
I'm asking you to donate to Tim just like he asked for me in 2017. Because hitting fundraising goals means helping people get their votes in on time, whether by mail or in person. And when _more people_ get their votes in, we can create policies that help _more people._

It's that simple, Derek.

**So what do you say - have I convinced you yet?[Drop $5, $100, or whatever you want to right here in this link. It will only take a second - what are you waiting for?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1093/3e0906/74769fa9/3e370e9f/74050082/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Drop+5+100+or+whatever+you+want+to+right&utm_campaign=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd&source=20181029_2_FR_RN_northam-ldnd")**

Thank you for reading and thank you, truly, for helping.

_Gov. Ralph Northam_

When we get Virginians out to vote -- like we did here in 2017 -- good things happen in the Commonwealth of Virginia. We can pass important bills like Medicaid expansion that make our states, and country, better. I'm doing everything I can at the state level, but there are some real threats at the federal level if we don't get out and vote. We can't send Tim's opponent, Corey Stewart, to the Senate and watch him take shots at Social Security, Medicaid, and our health care. We have to do something. "" First things first: We need them to hit their goal in two days. They have $24,618 to go, please donate below so they don 't fall short: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" I'm asking you to donate to Tim just like he asked for me in 2017. Because hitting fundraising goals means helping people get their votes in on time, whether by mail or in person. And when more people get their votes in, we can create policies that help more people. It's that simple, Derek. So what do you say - have I convinced you yet? "" Thank you for reading and thank you, truly, for helping. Gov. Ralph Northam "" "" | "" "" ""

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: America has no room for the ‘vile, hate-filled poison of anti-Semitism’
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 29, 2018
**America has no room for the ‘vile, hate-filled poison of anti-Semitism’** **The American flag** is flying at half-mast above the White House today as our Nation grieves the 11 victims of a despicable act of mass murder Saturday at the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. **“Anti-Semitism and the widespread persecution** of Jews represents one of the ugliest and darkest features of human history,” **[President Donald J. Trump](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2OTAxMDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45NjkwMTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/remarks-president-trump-91st-annual-future-farmers-america-convention-expo/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)** said from Indiana on Saturday. “The vile, hate-filled poison of anti-Semitism must be condemned and confronted everywhere and anywhere it appears.” **What unites Americans** is our common destiny, President Trump continued. “We mourn for the unthinkable loss of life that took place today, and we pledge in their name to fight for a future of justice, safety, tolerance, morality, dignity, and love. We must all rise above the hate.” **President Trump and the First Lady will visit Pittsburgh** tomorrow to meet with family members of the victims and mourn with the entire Pittsburgh community. The 11 Jewish-Americans killed “represented the very best of our Nation,” Press Secretary Sarah Sanders said from the White House today. The President “adores Jewish-Americans as part of his own family,” which includes his daughter, son-in-law, and several grandchildren, she noted. **As always** in moments such as these, America’s heroes in law enforcement do some of the most difficult work. Four of these brave officers were wounded while confronting the attacker this weekend. “They do so much for us,” President Trump said. “And they’re really unsung heroes. They don’t get the credit they deserve.” [**Watch President Trump’s response to the tragedy in Pittsburgh.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2OTAxMDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45NjkwMTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1056268302358638592) **More:** [**Press Secretary Sarah Sanders delivers an update this afternoon.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2OTAxMDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45NjkwMTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&102&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1056983901766406146)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Carlos Fyfe
**The American flag is flying at half-staff above the White House as our Nation grieves the victims of the shooting at Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh** | October 29, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2OTAxMDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45NjkwMTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2OTAxMDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45NjkwMTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI5Ljk2OTAxMDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyOS45NjkwMTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&105&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Frank Schultz, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: We cannot let this race come down to a coin-flip

body:
friend,

**$30 million.**

That is the amount that Hugin has spent of his own money thus far in this race to make it competitive. There isn't too much that $30 million can't buy and we are seeing it first-hand. Hugin's dirty money is buying unending TV ads to spread his lies.

And it is paying off for him because the experts over at _Cook Political Report_ moved our race to a "toss-up."

[**The future of New Jersey is in your hands and if we don't want a Donald Trump ally representing our state, then we need to do all we can to help re-elect Democratic Senator Bob Menendez. Chip in $5 or more today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf1/3af3c5d/38136f14/4ec31e82/2498355599/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-donate_button?gpsid=5_73_4803&refcode=em18_181030_tosupF_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_tosupF_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+The+future+of+New+Jersey+is+in+your+hand")

All of Hugin's lies are designed to take the focus away from his shameful record at Celgene.

They work to help otherwise strong New Jerseyans to ignore Hugin's undying support of Donald Trump and push misinformation out about Hugin's misogynistic and anti-LGBTQ past.

[**Chip in $5 or more now and help us turn this toss-up into a victory for Team Menendez on Election Day.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf1/3af3c5d/38136f14/4ec31e85/2498355599/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-donate_button?gpsid=5_73_4803&refcode=em18_181030_tosupF_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_tosupF_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+5+or+more+now+and+help+us+turn+t")

Frank
